name_cn:
Factory Grade Groove 20 Handbag Black
An irresistibly cute bag with a simple shape that is retro yet premium. Crafted from classic blue Oblique canvas, it is exquisite yet full of fashion sense. Suitable for both hand-carry and crossbody, it is lightweight and convenient to carry, and the capacity is sufficient for daily use.
size:20.5*13.5*12cm
